title: d2c IR Token Map
description: Model-authored file mapping Figma node IDs to per-property token references. Every value is a dotted path into design-tokens.json (e.g. 'colors.primary', 'spacing.md'). No hardcoded values permitted — unknown references must fail validation and trigger STOP AND ASK.

schema_version.description: IR artifact schema version. MUST match schema_version in all other IR artifacts (run-manifest, component-match, layout). Validator rejects mismatches.

nodes.description: Map of Figma node ID to a flat object of { cssPropertyOrSemanticName: dottedTokenPath }.

additionalProperties.description: Dotted path into design-tokens.json. Lowercase; category.name or category.group.name.
